Rationale: Stability: hold when load is moderate with ample headroom
vertical-first: instant core boost for moderate surges with SLO pressure
diagonal when both gradients non-zero: vertical-heavy for instant relief
diagonal-max: heavy load requires instant vertical and planned horizontal boost
emergency-diagonal: extreme vertical boost to bridge horizontal lag
cost-optimize: aggressive vertical+horizontal release when load is confirmed low
horizontal-burst: add replicas when cores are capped
replica-shed: aggressively remove excess replicas and cores when load is clearly low
cost-trim: reduce over-provisioned resources when current load is easily handled
